The Process

As easy as sliding into DMs.

01
Pick Your Vibe
Browse our seven curated hampers and find the one that matches your person's energy perfectly.
02
Slide Into Our DMs
Head to @solaris.biz on Instagram and drop us a message with the hamper name.
03
We Handle the Rest
We pack it with love, seal it with intention, and get it on its way to you.
